security_gap.gap_description: Vote input may be spoofed without signature verification.

actor_risk.description: The actor is unauthenticated and can perform governance actions.

behavioral_risk.rationale: The system accepts unsigned votes from external actors.

assumptions: The governance contract does not enforce signature verification for vote messages.
The actor is able to access the voting interface without authentication.

mitigation.strategy: Require signature-based vote authentication and role validation.

description: An attacker may impersonate a user and submit fraudulent votes to the governance contract.

security_gap.gap_description: Vote data could be modified in transit.

actor_risk.description: The actor is unauthenticated and can perform governance actions.

behavioral_risk.rationale: Vote data is transmitted over an insecure channel.

assumptions: The network connection between the user and the contract is susceptible to man-in-the-middle attacks.

mitigation.strategy: Employ end-to-end encryption and data integrity checks for vote transmission.

description: An attacker may intercept and modify vote data before it reaches the contract.

security_gap.gap_description: The system lacks mechanisms to verify the authenticity of votes.

actor_risk.description: The actor is unauthenticated and can perform governance actions.

behavioral_risk.rationale: The system does not track voter identities reliably.

assumptions: The system lacks logging or audit trails to prove who cast which votes.

mitigation.strategy: Implement robust logging and audit trails of all voting activity and voter identities.

description: An attacker may cast votes and deny responsibility.

security_gap.gap_description: Vote data may be accessible to unauthorized parties.

actor_risk.description: The actor is unauthenticated and can perform governance actions.

behavioral_risk.rationale: Vote data is not adequately protected from unauthorized access.

assumptions: The database storing vote information is vulnerable to SQL injection or other attacks.
The API endpoint for submitting votes does not implement proper authorization checks.

mitigation.strategy: Secure the database and API endpoint using appropriate access controls and input sanitization.

description: An attacker may gain access to vote data.
